rationale: Section 31.031 governs installment payment mechanics for taxpayers qualifying under §11.13(c), §11.132, or §11.22. Changing the §11.13(b) exemption amount does not alter eligibility, installment structure, or deadlines in §31.031; no amendment needed.
quote:
(a) This section applies only to:
(1) an individual who is:
(A) disabled or at least 65 years of age; and
(B) qualified for an exemption under Section 11.13(c); or
(2) an individual who is:
(A) a disabled veteran or the unmarried surviving spouse of a disabled veteran; and
(B) qualified for an exemption under Section 11.132 or 11.22.
_note: No direct conflict. §31.031 references §11.13(c), not §11.13(b). The proposed change to the general homestead exemption amount under §11.13(b) does not require conforming amendments to the installment payment provisions of §31.031.
